sn43.12:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the unconditioned and the path leading to the unconditioned. Listen to that … .
sn43.12:1.0.2: ii… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Insight: this is called … the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.3: iii… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned?sn.iv.363Concentration with thought and examination: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.4: vi… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Emptiness concentration … ."
sn43.12:1.0.5: ix… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu dwells contemplating the body in the body, ardent, clearly comprehending, mindful, having removed covetousness and displeasure in regard to the world: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.6: xiii… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu generates desire for the nonarising of unarisen evil unwholesome states; he makes an effort, arouses energy, applies his mind, and strives: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.7: xvii… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu develops the basis for spiritual power that possesses concentration due to desire and volitional formations of striving: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.8: xxi… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu develops the faculty of faith, which is based upon seclusion, dispassion, and cessation, maturing in release: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."sn.iv.366
sn43.12:1.0.9: xxvi… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu develops the power of faith, which is based upon seclusion, dispassion, and cessation, maturing in release: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.10: xxxi… "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu develops the enlightenment factor of mindfulness, which is based upon seclusion, dispassion, and cessation, maturing in release: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."
sn43.12:1.0.11: … "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu develops right view, which is based upon seclusion, dispassion, and cessation, maturing in release: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned … ."sn.iv.368
